description: A document providing proof that an individual's health insurance coverage has ended, including plan details and coverage dates.

policyholder_name.instruction: The full name of the individual whose health insurance coverage ended.

insurance_provider.instruction: The name of the health insurance company or provider.

group_name.instruction: The name of the insurance plan or employer group associated with the coverage.

group_number.instruction: The identifier assigned to the insurance group or plan, often labeled as Group Number or Plan Number.

policy_number.instruction: The policy number or member ID associated with the health insurance plan.

coverage_begin_date.instruction: The date the individual's coverage started. Sometimes labeled as Coverage Begin Date, Effective Date, or Start Date.

coverage_end_date.instruction: The date the individual's health insurance coverage ended or was terminated. Sometimes labeled as Coverage End Date, Termination Date, or Last Date of Coverage.

termination_reason.instruction: The reason the health insurance coverage ended such as job loss, plan cancellation, or voluntary termination.

employer_name.instruction: The employer providing the health insurance plan if the coverage was employer-sponsored.
